metadata.title: MagoTalk - Blockchain & Finance
metadata.description: In-depth conversations on Web3, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, and the future of digital finance.
metadata.ogDescription: Explore Web3 through thoughtful interviews on blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, and more.

Home.heroDescription: Real conversations with builders, founders, and insiders in crypto, AI, and finance.

About.title: About
About.subtitle: Crypto, DeFi, and Web3—in plain language.
About.aboutBody:
We break down crypto, DeFi, and the people building Web3.
You get straight talk—not hype.
About.missionBody:
We talk to founders, traders, and researchers so you learn faster.
You pick what matters to you.
About.teamIntro: Meet the people behind the mic.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: Say hello
Contact.pageIntro:
Email us or message on X.
We read every note.
Contact.collabBody:
Partner on episodes, events, or education.
Tell us what you need.

Books.pageIntro: Download MAGO's books in EPUB. Each title can provide English, Traditional, and Simplified editions.
Books.formatHint: EPUB adapts to phones, tablets, computers, and e-readers, with adjustable font size and reading modes.

bookDescriptions.moneyCode: Money Code is MAGO's guide to understanding money, work, leverage, and personal decision-making in a world reshaped by AI and digital networks.
